text:
Created attachment 235865
/var/log

FreeBSD ykla 13.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC amd64
VMware® Workstation 16 Pro 16.2.4 build-20089737
BIOS ZFS 

# pkg install xorg xf86-video-vmware open-vm-tools

I tested lightdm also not work.

I also tried to create X -copnfigure bug Xorg also not work. If works it will show twm.

------------------------------------
